scripts.build: npm run generate:schema && npm run typecheck && tsup
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e: npm run typecheck:tests && vitest run tests/e2e
scripts.test:integration: npm run typecheck:tests && vitest run tests/integration
scripts.test:unit: npm run typecheck:tests && vitest run tests/unit
